name: com.cidonix.unibridge
description: Local MCP tools that let AI coding agents inspect, edit, capture, and validate Unity Editor projects through a per-project bridge and relay.

_upm.changelog:
### Added

- Added bounded YAML reference locations for UniBridge_AssetIntelligence Action=ReferenceGraph, Dependents, and Impact via IncludeReferenceLocations=true. Locations include line, column, property path, YAML document, prefab/scene object path, indexed object path, component/script type, and preview text when inferable.
- Added script usage locations for UniBridge_ScriptIntelligence Action=Usages and Analyze IncludeUsages=true via IncludeUsageLocations=true.
- Added aliases such as asset_ref_search, asset_reference_search, asset_usages, reference_graph, reference_locations, script_usages, code_usages, and unity_code_usages across BatchActions, Discover, ToolGuide, and DomainCatalog.

### Improved

- UniBridge_BatchActions now normalizes AssetIntelligence ReferenceGraph/Impact aliases and ScriptIntelligence usage aliases for easier batch reference checks.

### Previous Changes

- UniBridge_AssetIntelligence Action=Structure provides read-only prefab and already-loaded scene asset structure workflows.
- UniBridge_TypeSchema TypeIndex and TypeFingerprint provide compact loaded Unity type maps and cache fingerprints.
- UniBridge_BatchActions can append opt-in post-action console and editor-event diagnostics.
- UniBridge_RuntimeStateProbe Action=Assert evaluates read-only runtime watch/assertion rules and can fail BatchActions on required failed assertions.
- UniBridge_RuntimeProfiler measures bounded ProfilerRecorder samples for runtime performance triage.
- Bundled relay 1.1.0-build.15 recovers RefreshAssets connection loss caused by Unity import/domain reload.
